scripts.start:k3d:dev: bash ops/run-with-env.sh bash -ec 'k3d cluster start "$WORKLOAD_CLUSTER_NAME" || bash ops/k3d/bootstrap-workload.sh; bash ops/k8s/setup-data-layer.sh; bash ops/k8s/deploy-app-local.sh; kubectl --context "$WORKLOAD_CONTEXT" -n "$APP_NAMESPACE" scale deployment/outbox-worker --replicas="$OUTBOX_WORKER_REPLICAS"; bash ops/k8s/forward-postgres.sh'
scripts.start:k3d:test: bash ops/run-with-env.sh bash -ec 'k3d cluster start "$WORKLOAD_CLUSTER_NAME" || bash ops/k3d/bootstrap-workload.sh; bash ops/k8s/setup-data-layer.sh; bash ops/k8s/deploy-app-local.sh'
